title: Process for high-pressure hydrogenation of carbon dioxide to syngas and methane using copper-manganese-aluminum mixed metal oxide catalysts
abstract: Processes and catalysts for the hydrogenation of carbon dioxide reaction are disclosed. A process for hydrogenation carbon dioxide (CO 2 ) to produce a syngas containing composition that includes hydrogen (H 2 ), carbon monoxide (CO), and methane can include contacting a CuMnAl mixed metal oxide catalyst with H 2 and CO 2 at a temperature of at least 550 Â°C and a pressure greater than atmospheric pressure to produce the syngas containing composition.
claims: Claims 1. A process for hydrogenating carbon dioxide (C0 2 ) to produce an oxo-synthesis syngas and methane (CH 4 ) containing composition, the process comprising contacting a CuMnAl mixed metal oxide catalyst with a reactant feed comprising hydrogen (H 2 ) and C0 2 at a H 2 :C0 2 volume ratio of at least 0.5 : 1, wherein the reaction occurs at a temperature of at least 550 Â°C and a pressure of at least 0.5 MPa to produce a product stream comprising H 2 and CO at a H 2 :CO molar ratio of 2 or less and methane (CH 4 ) in an amount of at least 5 molar %. 2. The process of claim 1, wherein temperature is from 550 Â°C to 650 Â°C, preferably 570 Â°C to 650 Â°C, or more preferably 600 Â°C to 645 Â°C. 3. The process of any one of claims 1 or 2, wherein the pressure is from 0.5 MPa to 6 MPa, 0.5 MPa to 3 MPa, or 0.5 MPa to 2 MPa. 4. The process of any one of claims 1 or 2, wherein the reactant feed comprises a H 2 :C0 2 volume ratio of 0.5 to 2, the reaction occurs at a temperature of 570 Â°C to 600 Â°C, and a pressure of 0.5 MPa to 3 MPa, and the syngas containing composition comprises a H 2 :CO molar ratio of 0.7: 1 to 1.3 : 1, and comprises methane (CH 4 ) in an amount of 15 molar % to 25 molar %. 5. The process of any one of claims 1 or 2, wherein the reaction occurs at a temperature of 550 Â°C to 650 Â°C and a pressure of 0.5 MPa to 2 MPa, wherein the syngas containing composition comprises a H 2 :CO molar ratio of 0.5 to 2, and comprises methane (CY ) in an amount of 5 molar % to 35 molar %. 6. The process of any one of claims 1 or 2, wherein the reaction occurs at a temperature of 635 Â°C to 645 Â°C and a pressure of 0.5 MPa to 1.5 MPa, and the syngas containing composition comprises a H 2 :CO molar ratio of 0.9: 1 to 1.3 : 1, and comprises methane (CH 4 ) in an amount of 25 molar % to 35 molar %. 7. The process of any one of claims 1 or 2, wherein the syngas containing composition is used to produce oxo-products. 8. The process of any one of claims 1 or 2, wherein the syngas containing composition comprises 30 mol. % C0 2 or more. 9. The process of any one of claims 1 or 2, wherein the CuMnAl mixed metal oxide catalyst comprises 1 wt.% to 10 wt.% Cu, 1 wt.% to 30 wt.% of Mn, and 60 wt.% to 98 wt.% of A1 2 0 3 . 10. The process of any one of claims 1 or 2, wherein the CuMnAl mixed metal oxide catalyst comprises 3 to 7 wt.% Cu, preferably about 5 wt.% Cu, 5 to 15 wt. % Mn, preferably about 10 wt.% of Mn, and at least 75 wt.% of A1 2 0 3 , preferably about 83 to 87 wt. % A1 2 0 3 . 11. The process of any one of claims 1 or 2, wherein the catalyst has a surface area of 200 m 2 /g to 300 m 2 /g, 225 m 2 /g to 270 m 2 /g, or 250 m 2 /g to 260 m 2 /g. 12. The process of any one of claims 1 or 2, further comprising a H 2 gas flow rate of 30 to 70 mL/min and the C0 2 gas flow rate of 30 to 70 mL/min. 13. The process of claim 12, wherein the H 2 gas flow rate is about 50 mL/min and the C0 2 gas flow rate is about 50 mL/min. 14. The process of any one of claims 1 or 2 , wherein the syngas containing composition has a H 2 :CO molar ratio of 0.8: 1 to 1.3 : 1. 15. The process of any one of claims 1 or 2, wherein the syngas containing composition comprises 5 mol.% to 15 mol.% CO, 55 mol.% to 65 mol.% C0 2 , 15 mol.% to 25 mol.% CH 4 and 5 mol.% to 15 mol.% H 2 . 16. The process of any one of claims 1 or 2, wherein the syngas containing composition comprises 5 mol.% to 15 mol.% CO, 45 mol.% to 55 mol.% C0 2 , 25 mol.% to 35 mol.% CH 4 and 10 mol.% to 15 mol.% H 2 . 17. The process of any one of claims 1 or 2, wherein the C0 2 conversion is at least 30%. 18. The process of any one of claims 1 or 2, further comprising removing the C0 2 from the product stream. 19. The process of any one of claims 1 or 2, further comprising using the produced syngas mixture as an intermediate or as feed material in a subsequent synthesis to form oxo- products. 0. The process of claim 18, wherein the oxo-products comprise C 2 + alcohols, alkyl ethers, or dimethyl ether.
